_comment: Shipped preset for VLM material estimation via ComfyUI's native TextGenerate + Qwen3-VL 8B (core LLM support, no custom node packs). The PBR estimation prompt lives in the TextGenerate widget; MaterialStage extracts the first {...} JSON block from the generated text and merges it into the material editor. Verified on the Vectary buckle reference: frosted translucent cover → transmission 0.9 / #2e8b57, solid body → transmission 0 / #006633. gemma4_e4b was tested and rejected — it ignored the image (identical grey answers for different patches).
label: Qwen3-VL 8B Estimate
description: Estimate PBR material parameters from an image patch with Qwen3-VL 8B (ComfyUI built-in TextGenerate). Outputs a JSON string. Requires qwen3vl_8b_fp8_scaled.safetensors in models/clip or models/text_encoders.

image.error: Material estimation needs an image — wire one into the stage's image input.
